subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up — it was great meeting you at the conference, and we’d be glad to continue the conversation.

We can certainly arrange a 30-minute call next week. Here are some proposed time windows:
- April 21, 2026 between 14:00–16:00 (your local time)
- April 22, 2026 between 14:00–16:00
- April 23, 2026 between 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which of these slots works best for you, or feel free to suggest an alternative if needed.

Regarding your request for direct contact details (email and phone) for our CTO and VP of Engineering, we’re not able to share internal contact information. For appropriate public contact channels and information about our leadership team, please refer to the contact and leadership sections on our public website.

Looking forward to speaking with you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Team]
